title: Fields, Negotiation, Compression, Validators, and Caching · Type-System Trace: Field Multivalue Parsing
summary: The service naïvely splits repeated fields, sniffs content, omits Vary, compresses secrets, caches personalized responses, and computes unstable validators. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts field multivalue parsing increment in representation selection, compression, and cache contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle case-insensitive names, repeated lines, list grammar, whitespace, forbidden hop-by-hop fields, header size, and Node joining behavior by field semantics.
Record bounded route, request ID, trusted peer, and redacted target evidence without logging credentials, tokens, personal data, or unbounded query values.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Field Multivalue Parsing · Theory Field Multivalue Parsing
